title: Historical Audit Pressure Prioritization
goal: Implement #448 so compact summary separates current execution pressure from historical audit backlog and prioritizes audit residue.
non_goals: Do not remove historical audit evidence from the full profile.
Do not close #442 until the parent intent is reassessed after this slice.

intent.outcome: Compact summary recommends the current action first and keeps historical audit candidates recoverable but clearly lower priority unless they match the active lane.
intent.constraints: Keep the default summary compact and avoid adding another first-contact surface.
intent.latitude: Choose the smallest prioritization fields that make current-vs-historical pressure obvious.
intent.escalation: Escalate if prioritization requires changing issue tracker semantics or hiding current open work.

execution.next_step: Promote #468 as the remaining #442 child slice before reassessing parent closure.
execution.proof: package planning tests, workspace CLI tests, ruff checks, proof selector, and planning doctor

invariants: Compact startup should answer what needs attention now.
Full profile should still expose the complete historical audit backlog.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: #442: make the plan -> implement -> evaluate continuation loop first-class for long lanes.

required_continuation.required follow-on detail: #468 remains open before #442 can be honestly closed.

parent_lane.title: Add an autopilot intent loop for plan, implement, evaluate, and continue

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Compact summary now exposes current_execution_pressure and historical_audit_pressure so the active lane is separated from prioritized historical audit backlog.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: #442 still needs explicit autopilot-loop status for satisfied, continued, blocked, and routed intent; captured as #468.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: The package can reduce audit noise without hiding full-profile backlog by enriching compact samples and leaving full finished-work inspection intact.
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py -q; cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/installer.py packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/historical-audit-pressure-prioritization.plan.json --format json; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Prioritize historical audit pressure by current lane, recency, owner, and supersession.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Do not drown the active lane in historical backlog, and do not hide full audit evidence from full profile.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: The exact prioritization score and compact field shape.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: The implementation would need tracker-specific semantics in core planning.

context_budget.live working set: state, this execplan, #448 issue, summary construction, finished-work inspection, external-intent evidence, and workspace CLI tests
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Next active issue is #448 historical audit pressure prioritization.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Before changing external tracker semantics or hiding full-profile audit detail.
context_budget.resume from: #468 autopilot loop status before #442 closure reassessment

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Compact startup should answer what needs attention now without making agents chase historical residue.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Prioritize and group existing summary evidence rather than adding another dashboard.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: After this slice, can #442 close honestly or is one more continuation needed?

active_milestone.scope: Keep this execution thread bounded to the promoted TODO item.

immediate_next_action: Inspect summary construction for historical audit and current execution pressure.
Add compact prioritization fields without expanding full-profile payload by default.
Add focused tests for active-lane separation, historical candidate metadata, and full-profile backlog preservation.
invariants: Preserve the planning contract and keep the work bounded to this plan.
validation_commands: cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py -q
cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .
uv run ruff check src tests packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests

uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/installer.py packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/historical-audit-pressure-prioritization.plan.json --format json
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: Compact summary separates current execution pressure from historical audit backlog.
Historical candidates include priority, age or recency, owner, and supersession status where known.
Summary recommends one current action when possible.
Full profile still exposes the complete audit backlog.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Compact summary separates current execution pressure from historical audit pressure, gives one current next action, prioritizes historical candidates with priority/recency/owner/supersession metadata, and preserves full-profile backlog detail.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py -q; cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/installer.py packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/historical-audit-pressure-prioritization.plan.json --format json; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: Archived execplan records that #442 remains open because explicit loop status is still needed.

closure_check.why this decision is honest: #448 acceptance criteria are covered, but parent #442 still needs explicit machine-readable autopilot-loop status for satisfied, continued, blocked, or routed intent.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: summary compact includes current_execution_pressure and historical_audit_pressure; full profile still includes complete finished_work_inspection_contract. Follow-up #468 owns remaining parent status gap.
closure_check.reopen trigger: compact summary still makes agents chase historical audit backlog before current execution pressure

drift_log: 2026-04-27: Created #468 after closeout review showed #442 still lacked explicit loop status.
